svgExport.failedReason: KiCad CLI could not load this schematic; keep it pending manual review or replace it in v2.

evidence: 49 of 50 corpus entries exported to original KiCad SVG successfully, so visual comparison artifacts are available.
Text-distance anomalies can be caused either by a ModuMake transform bug or by original KiCad properties intentionally placed far from the symbol.
One high-count text-placement entry failed KiCad CLI export and should not be auto-labeled.
bucketReviews.recommendedAction: Do not change property placement rules globally until each selected SVG is compared with the ModuMake render.

evidence: Power-label-off-connection can represent a real VCC/GND anchor bug.
The same signal can also appear in old schematics as annotation-like text rather than an electrical label.
SVG export artifacts are available for manual source-vs-render comparison.
bucketReviews.recommendedAction: Only fix parser/render anchor behavior for entries where the original KiCad SVG shows the label attached but ModuMake detaches it.

evidence: The sampled R/C/L components in all 10 passive-value corpus entries have a Value property present but empty in the source S-expression.
No automatic evidence showed a populated alternate value field for those sampled anomalies.
The current warning is therefore a conservative data-quality warning, not a parser extraction failure.
bucketReviews.recommendedAction: Keep these as conservative warnings unless manual review finds a non-standard alternate value field that should be parsed.

evidence: The sampled low-confidence entries are dominated by custom, legacy, Altium-imported, prototyping-pad, connector, and family-library symbols.
The parser imports the symbols; the weak point is template/part-family classification.
Adding exact part records for every symbol would overfit this dataset.
bucketReviews.recommendedAction: Treat as mapper/catalog backlog. Add family-level rules for recurring custom libraries before adding exact SKU records.

evidence: No-pin custom symbols are now preserved as symbol-only components in the lightweight path while unresolved evidence remains visible.
Reportable component counting now uses a shared policy across imported/integrated report paths.

The report-count regression set covers the previous final lightweight mismatch and the integrated-count side effects found during the fix; both integrated and lightweight count-divergence findings are now zero in that set.
bucketReviews.recommendedAction: Keep these entries as regression coverage. Do not use report-count-divergence as the next active code-fix bucket unless it reappears in a fresh full dataset pass.

completedFixes.problem: Some custom KiCad library symbols have no parsed pins in the lightweight path and disappear from lightweight components while integrated/imported paths still retain them.
completedFixes.expectedFix: Preserve them as symbol-only/import-confidence-limited components instead of dropping them silently.

completedFixes.problem: Testpoints, power helpers, and schematic helper symbols are counted differently by legacy/imported/integrated/lightweight report paths.
completedFixes.expectedFix: Define one reportable-component policy and use it across validation JSON builders.

completedFixes.problem: The transmier schematic showed VCC/GND labels and C1/C2 capacitor property text detached or visually normalized away from the original KiCad source placement.
completedFixes.expectedFix: Preserve KiCad source anchors, text anchors, baselines, and native property-text orientation for imported original rendering.

nextFixBacklog.problem: Some property text appears far from symbols, but automatic review cannot distinguish source-authored placement from ModuMake transform bugs.
nextFixBacklog.expectedFix: Compare original KiCad SVG/source with ModuMake render and only patch confirmed transform/anchor bugs.

nextFixBacklog.problem: Some VCC/GND/power labels appear detached, but automatic review cannot distinguish real labels from annotation-like legacy text.
nextFixBacklog.expectedFix: Patch parser/render anchor handling only for entries where original KiCad shows an attached electrical label.

nextFixBacklog.problem: Recurring custom and legacy symbol families still fall back to low-confidence mappings.
nextFixBacklog.expectedFix: Add family-level mapper/catalog rules for recurring libraries before exact SKU expansion.

manualReviewRule: Only write humanLabel in the corpus manifest after comparing original KiCad SVG/source with ModuMake render/report. Agent review labels must not be copied into humanLabel automatically.
